metadata.title: SovEcom Storefront
metadata.description: The open-source headless ecommerce platform built for the European Union.

seo.homeDescription: Browse the catalog of our open-source, EU-first store — privacy-friendly by design.
seo.productsDescription: Browse all products in our catalog.
seo.categoriesDescription: Browse all product categories in our catalog.
seo.searchDescription: Search the catalog to find the products you are looking for.

cart.openCart: Cart, {count, plural, =0 {empty} one {# item} other {# items}}

discount.label: Discount code
discount.invalid: That code is not valid or cannot be applied to this cart.
discount.error: Could not apply the code. Please try again.

shipping.heading: Estimate shipping
shipping.none: No shipping rates are available for this destination.
shipping.error: Could not estimate shipping. Please try again.

home.heroSubtitle: The open-source, EU-first headless commerce platform. Built for data sovereignty and correct European compliance.

search.title: Search
search.prompt: Enter a search term to find products.

product.selectVariantPrompt: Select an option to see price and availability
product.addError: Could not add to cart. Please try again.

cookieBanner.heading: Privacy-friendly by design
cookieBanner.body: We use only strictly necessary cookies to run this store — no advertising or third-party tracking. Any optional analytics are privacy-friendly and aggregate-only.

auth.errorShortPassword: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.errorUnexpected: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Create an account to check out faster.
register.duplicateEmail: An account with this email already exists. Please sign in instead.
register.weakPassword: That password isn’t allowed. Choose a stronger, less common password.
register.accountCreatedSignIn: Your account was created, but we couldn’t sign you in automatically. Please sign in.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email address for your account and we’ll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.success: If an account exists for that email address, you’ll receive a reset link shortly.
forgot.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
reset.success: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in.
reset.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
reset.resetError: We couldn’t reset your password — the link may have expired, or your new password is too common. Request a new link or try a different password.
reset.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
reset.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.empty: Your cart is empty, so there is nothing to check out.

email.label: Email address
email.error: Could not save your email. Please try again.

address.billingSame: Billing address is the same as shipping
address.name: Full name
address.error: Could not save your address. Please try again.

shipping.none: No shipping methods are available for this address.
shipping.error: Could not load shipping methods. Please try again.

vat.heading: Business VAT number
vat.label: EU VAT number
vat.error: Could not save your VAT number. Please try again.
vat.reverseCharge: Reverse charge applies — no VAT is charged on this order. You account for VAT in your country.
vat.unvalidated: This VAT number could not be validated, so VAT is charged. Please check the number.

payment.genericError: We could not process your payment. Please try again.
payment.configError: Online payment is temporarily unavailable. Please contact us to complete your order.
payment.addressError: Please provide a valid shipping address before paying.
payment.successHeading: Thank you — your payment is confirmed
payment.receivedHeading: Thank you — we’ve received your order
payment.confirmingBody: Your order is placed and we’re confirming your payment. We’ll email you once it’s complete.
payment.guestReceiptNote: We’ve emailed your order confirmation and receipt.
payment.processingBody: Your payment is being processed. We will email you when it completes.
payment.failedBody: Your payment did not go through. No charge was made — please try again.
payment.lookupFallback: Your order is confirmed. Check the confirmation email for your order details and receipt link.
payment.orderLoadError: We could not load your order right now. Please check your confirmation email.

dashboard.title: My account
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your orders, addresses and profile.
dashboard.ordersCardDesc: View your order history and download invoices.
dashboard.addressesCardDesc: Manage your saved shipping and billing addresses.
dashboard.profileCardDesc: Update your contact details and preferences.

addresses.title: Saved addresses
addresses.empty: You have no saved addresses yet.
addresses.loadError: Could not load your addresses. Please try again.
addresses.saveError: Could not save the address. Please try again.
addresses.deleteError: Could not delete the address. Please try again.
addresses.name: Full name

profile.title: Edit profile
profile.emailReadonlyNote: To change your email or password, go to Security.
profile.vatNotValidated: VAT number not yet validated — VAT will be charged until validated.
profile.saveError: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

email.heading: Change email address
email.description: Enter your new email address and your current password. We'll send a verification link to the new address — your email changes only after you confirm it there.
email.pendingNote: A change to {pendingEmail} is pending — check your inbox or request a new link.
email.success: Check your new inbox — we've sent a verification link to {newEmail}.
email.sameEmailError: Your new email must be different from your current email.
email.stepUpFailed: Password incorrect or too many attempts. Please try again.
email.error: Could not start the email change. Please try again.

confirm.success: Your email address has been updated. You can sign in with it from now on.
confirm.expiredError: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new email change from your account.
confirm.takenError: That email address is already in use. Please choose a different one from your account.
confirm.error: Could not confirm your new email. Please try again, or request a new link from your account.

security.heading: Security
security.description: Change your password. For your security, all your other signed-in sessions will be signed out.
security.errorTooShort: Your new password must be at least 12 characters.
security.errorTooLong: Your new password must be at most 1024 characters.
security.errorMismatch: The new passwords do not match.
security.errorWeak: This password is too common or easy to guess. Please choose a stronger one.
security.stepUpFailed: Password incorrect or too many attempts. Please try again.
security.error: Could not change your password. Please try again.

rgpd.heading: Your data & privacy
rgpd.stepUpFailed: Password incorrect or too many attempts. Please try again.

export.heading: Export my data
export.description: Download a copy of your personal data (profile, addresses, orders, invoices and email history) as a JSON file. For your security, enter your current password to continue.
export.error: Could not export your data. Please try again.

erase.heading: Delete my account
erase.description: Permanently delete your account. This is irreversible and cannot be undone.
erase.legalRetentionNote: Your order history and invoices are retained for 10 years for tax and accounting obligations under French law; your personal data is anonymised.
erase.confirmEmailLabel: Type your email address to confirm
erase.confirmEmailMismatch: The email you typed does not match your account email.
erase.error: Could not delete your account. Please try again.

rgpd.pageSubtitle: Export or delete your personal data.

orders.title: Order history
orders.loadError: Could not load your orders. Please try again.
orders.notFound: Order not found or you do not have access to it.
orders.invoiceDownloadError: Could not download the invoice. Please try again.

returns.title: Request a return
returns.intro: Select the items you want to return or withdraw from this order. Your request will be reviewed before any refund is issued.
returns.withdrawalInfo: Under the EU right of withdrawal, you may withdraw from your purchase within 14 days without giving a reason. The statutory withdrawal information and model form are provided by the store.
returns.learnMore: Read the withdrawal information and model form
returns.notEligible: This order is not eligible for a return.
returns.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one item to return.
returns.errorOverQuantity: The requested quantity exceeds what can be returned for one or more items.
returns.saveError: Could not submit your request. Please try again.
returns.loadError: Could not load this order. Please try again.
